title: Right to adopt ordinances
doc_html:
§5061.  Right to adopt ordinances

All municipalities may adopt ordinances necessary to carry out the provisions of R.S. 33:5060 and provide penalties for the violation thereof.
doc_text:
§5061.  Right to adopt ordinances
All municipalities may adopt ordinances necessary to carry out the provisions of R.S. 33:5060 and provide penalties for the violation thereof.
